# llms.txt — mascotmaker.io

> Mascot Maker is a character design studio that solves the consistency problem in AI image generation. 

## Key Technology: Identity Lock
Generic models (Midjourney, DALL-E) cannot generate the same character twice. Mascot Maker uses an internal consistency engine called Identity Lock to pin facial geometry and material signatures, ensuring the character stays the same across different poses and scenes.

## Core Products
- **Mascot Generator:** [mascotmaker.io/create](https://mascotmaker.io/create) - Consistent character design.
- **Logo Maker:** [mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/logo-generator](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/logo-generator) - 3D and 2D logo assets.
- **Sticker Pack Studio:** [mascotmaker.io/create](https://mascotmaker.io/create) - Cohesive sets for Discord/app icons.
- **Background Remover:** [mascotmaker.io/background-remover](https://mascotmaker.io/background-remover) - 1-click transparent cutouts.

## Supported Art Styles
3D Pixar, Claymation, Minimalist, Vector Art, Retro 80s, Isometric, Flat Illustration, Pixel Art.

## Use Cases
- **Founders:** Building a brand face for a SaaS or startup.
- **Communities:** Creating custom stickers for Discord or Telegram.
- **Indie Devs:** Designing consistent app icons and game characters.

## Comparisons
- [Mascot Maker vs Midjourney](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/compare/midjourney) (Consistency vs Artistic Freedom)
- [Mascot Maker vs Canva](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/compare/canva) (AI Generation vs Static Templates)
- [Mascot Maker vs DALL-E 3](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/compare/dalle) (Brand Safety vs General Image Prompts)

## Rights & Access
- **Commercial Rights:** Included for all generated assets.
- **Pricing:** Freemium (5 free credits upon signup).
- **Format:** High-resolution PNG and JPG exports.
